data.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written ✓ — Added RED eval test case 'Phase 3 completion: writes sentinel file after epic ticket is created' to plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml. Test asserts SKILL.md instructs writing a sentinel file after Phase 3 completes, which current SKILL.md does not include, so it will FAIL (RED).
